notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez singles on a bunt ground ball to pitcher Bryce Elder. Gabriel Moreno scores. Nolan Arenado scores. Jose Fernandez to 2nd. Throwing error by pitcher Bryce Elder.

notableEvents.label: Geraldo Perdomo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Geraldo Perdomo grounds into a double play, first baseman Matt Olson to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Corbin Carroll out at 2nd. Geraldo Perdomo out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Adrian Del Castillo grounds into a double play, first baseman Matt Olson to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Gabriel Moreno out at 2nd. Adrian Del Castillo out at 1st.
